condo.title: Condominium
condo.my_subtitle: Condominiums where you are owner, admin or resident
condo.meta_my_desc: Manage your condominiums — fractions, quotas, assemblies and budget.
condo.empty_subtitle: Create your first condominium or accept an invite from your building administrator.
condo.landing_meta: Free and open-source condominium management — digital assemblies, weighted voting, transparent budget with Merkle audit. Lei 8/2022 compliant.
condo.meta_create_desc: Register your condominium online for free. Digital assemblies, weighted voting by ownership share, quota management — all Lei 8/2022 compliant.
condo.meta_fractions_desc: Manage condominium fractions — ownership shares, residents, invites and property units.
condo.meta_quotas_desc: Track monthly condominium quotas — payments per fraction, collections and transparent budgeting.
condo.meta_assembly_desc: Create a condominium assembly with weighted digital voting by ownership share, Lei 8/2022 compliant.
condo.meta_invite_desc: Accept an invitation to join your condominium on Parahub — free and transparent management.
condo.name: Condominium name
condo.regulamento_placeholder: Paste your condominium regulations text here (optional)
condo.fractions_subtitle: Add all fractions. Permilagem total must equal 1000.
condo.budget_hint: Total monthly condominium expenses (insurance, cleaning, maintenance, etc.)
condo.no_budget_hint: No monthly budget set. Set a budget to start tracking quotas.
condo.assembly_subtitle: Create a weighted vote for a condominium assembly
condo.poll_description_placeholder: Provide details about the agenda item
condo.empty_assemblies_subtitle: Create your first assembly vote below.
condo.assembly_weight_info: Each vote is weighted by the owner's fraction permilagem (ownership share in ‰). The result reflects the proportion of ownership, not just the number of voters.
condo.invite_accept_subtitle: You have been invited to join:
condo.invite_already_assigned: This fraction already has a resident
condo.landing_hero_title: Modern condominium management — free and open-source
condo.landing_hero_subtitle: Digital assemblies, weighted voting, transparent budget and community energy — all in compliance with Portuguese law (Lei 8/2022)
condo.landing_problem_1: In-person assemblies with low turnout — decisions made by a minority
condo.landing_problem_2: Budget managed without transparency — residents don't know how fees are spent
condo.landing_problem_3: Management companies charge €50–200/month — money that could stay in the building
condo.landing_feature_1_desc: Vote online with permilagem-weighted voting, in compliance with Lei 8/2022
condo.landing_feature_2_desc: Participatory allocation with median voting and Merkle audit trail — every cent traceable
condo.landing_feature_3_desc: Track monthly quotas per fraction, see who paid and who didn't, delinquency alerts
condo.landing_feature_4_desc: Delegate your vote to a trusted neighbor when you can't attend — transitive and verifiable delegation
condo.landing_feature_5_desc: Collective solar energy self-consumption among residents under DL 15/2022 — transparent production and consumption tracking
condo.landing_feature_6_desc: End-to-end encrypted group chat for residents via Matrix protocol
condo.landing_feature_7_desc: Invite residents per fraction with secure links — they join with one click
condo.landing_feature_8_desc: Open-source, no subscription, no ads. Community infrastructure, not a product
condo.landing_how_1: Create your condominium and add fractions
condo.landing_how_3: Start voting, manage budget and quotas
condo.landing_free_desc: Parahub is civic infrastructure. Condominium management should not cost money — unlike traditional companies, we charge nothing.
